title: A2A Message Envelope v1
description: Envelope format for Brain-to-Brain A2A (Agent2Agent) messages. Wraps the 10 dual-brain event types defined in LSP-BRAINS-SPEC.md Section 10.4. Used for fractal composition (parent/child) and dual brain (local/external) coordination. Not used for sensory tool invocation — see MCP sensory contract (cmdb-envelope-v1).

message_id.description: Unique message identifier (UUID v4 RECOMMENDED). Used as idempotency key — duplicate receipt MUST be a no-op that returns the cached response.

task_id.description: Correlation ID for multi-message tasks. Optional for one-shot messages; REQUIRED for streaming tasks.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of message origination.

brain_id.description: Identifier of the originating Brain. Matches the id in its Agent Card (agent-card-v1).

message_type.description: One of the 10 canonical A2A message types. Payload shape varies by type; see Section 10.4 + Appendix G.

reply_to.description: For request/response patterns (e.g., snapshot.requested -> snapshot.delivered): the message_id being answered.

payload.description: Message-type-specific payload. Conforming impls SHOULD validate payload against the per-type schema documented in Appendix G.

metadata.description: Transport/routing metadata. Impls MAY use this for delivery hints, trace IDs, auth tokens (when auth is configured).
